bugs_found.description: inject_coherence() can produce NaN/Inf when noise_vector contains zeros. The line `manifold_projection = noise_vector * GOD_CODE / np.mean(np.abs(noise_vector) + 1e-9)` is safe, but `final_signal = ordered_vector / (mean_val / GOD_CODE)` can blow up when mean_val is very small (near 1e-15 threshold). The guard `abs(mean_val) > 1e-15` is brittle — values just above the threshold produce extreme scaling.
bugs_found.fix: Use a safer normalization: clamp (mean_val / GOD_CODE) to [1e-10, inf] before division, or apply np.clip to final_signal.

bugs_found.description: The ZNE correction divides final_signal by zne_correction which can be > 1.0, effectively reducing signal strength when ENTROPY_ZNE_BRIDGE_ENABLED=True. The correction magnitude is unvalidated — noise_estimate can be arbitrarily large for noisy inputs, leading to excessive attenuation.
bugs_found.fix: Clamp zne_correction to a bounded range, e.g., [1.0, 1.0 + PHI_CONJUGATE].
